data.title: FRONTERA ANNOUNCES RESULTS OF SPECIAL SHAREHOLDER MEETING
data.description: Shareholders of Frontera have given the green light for the arrangement with Parex, with the return of capital agreement set to be finalized by the second quarter of 2026. This move will see Frontera transition into a standalone infrastructure entity. The approval signals a significant development for the company in Calgary, Alberta, announced on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Li Auto Inc. April 2026 Delivery Update
data.description: Li Auto Inc., a prominent player in China's new energy vehicle sector, reported the delivery of 34,085 vehicles in April 2026. The company's total deliveries as of April 30, 2026, amounted to 1,669,442 units. Li Auto is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LI and on HKEX as 2015.

data.title: UWMC Issues Open Letter to Two Harbors Stockholders Detailing New $12 Per Share Offer
data.description: In Pontiac, Michigan and New York, UWM Holdings Corporation ("UWMC") (NYSE: UWMC) has recently released an open letter directed towards the stockholders of Two Harbors Investment Corp. ("Two Harbors") (NYSE: TWO). The letter emphasizes UWMC's new offer of $12 per share, highlighting its superiority over Two Harbors' planned deal with CrossCountry. Additionally, it criticizes Two Harbors' Board and management for not prioritizing the shareholders' interests and implementing certain strategies that may not benefit them.

data.title: Divi Resorts Introduces Sweet Summer Savings with Special Low Rates Across the Caribbean
data.description: Experience the Caribbean at budget-friendly rates with the latest promotion by Divi Resorts. Take advantage of the limited-time offer with summer rates as low as $164/night for trips up to October 31, 2026. This deal is perfect for those looking to enjoy a tropical getaway without breaking the bank. Chapel Hill, North Carolina, April 30, 2026 - Kick start your summer plans with the Sweet Summer Savings promo from Divi Resorts. Explore breathtaking destinations in the Caribbean while keeping your accommodation costs affordable.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Apple Climbs On Earnings, Sandisk Skids; Stock Market At High
data.description: Following record highs in the stock market due to strong earnings and decreased oil prices, Apple, Sandisk, and Roku were significant players. Dow Jones Futures saw an increase with Apple showcasing a rise in earnings, while Sandisk experienced a decline. This surge indicates a positive trend in the market.

data.title: Xi'an showcases smart city governance model
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on April 30, 2026, representatives from seven countries came together at the 2026 Global Mayors Dialogue to discuss digitalization and efficiency in city governance. Mayors and government officials participated in sharing valuable insights. The event took place in Shaanxi and covered important topics for modern urban management.
